//: NexusEdu OpenCode config. 3 free providers, NO bridge needed - OpenCode talks to each natively. Keys come from environment variables (set as Codespaces Secrets), referenced with {env:...} so they are NEVER hardcoded in the repo.

openrouter.//: OpenRouter: 300+ models, many free (ids end in :free). Built-in provider; key via env.

cloudflare.//: Cloudflare Workers AI via its OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Uses @ai-sdk/openai-compatible. ACCOUNT_ID + token from env.
cloudflare.name: Cloudflare Workers AI

//default: Default = an OpenRouter free model. Change with /models inside OpenCode or the -m flag.
//instructions: OpenCode auto-reads these files for project rules (like CLAUDE.md for Claude Code).
